LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CONEYBEARE INC.'S DEMURRER TO THE ENTIRE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS, IN GOOD FAITH, THAT DARIUS WAS ACTING IN THE COURSE AND SCOPE OF HIS EMPLOYMENT WHEN THE ALLEGED INCIDENT OCCURRED. (SEE CACI 3720.) TO THE EXTENT THAT PLAINTIFF IS ALLEGING A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT HIRING AND RETENTION, PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS, IN GOOD FAITH, THAT CONEYBEARE KNEW OR SHOULD HAVE KNOWN THAT DARIUS WAS UNFIT TO PERFORM HIS JOB, OR WOULD CREATE A HARM, AND THAT PARTICULAR HARM MATERIALIZED. (SEE PHILLIPS V. TLC PLUMBING, INC. (2009) 172 CAL.APP.4TH 1133, 1139.) PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE OF THE RULING. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 =(302/LCN)

Off Calendar Sep-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

DEFENDANT CONEYBEARE INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is a duplicate entry.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. NIKOLAUS REED, TEL. NO. 940-7766 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KATHLEEN J. PATTERSON OF HOMAN & STONE, TEL. NO. (909) 307-9380 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court modified its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: Defendant Coneybeare Inc.'s demurrer to the entire First Amended Complaint and first cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff is given 20 days leave to amend to plead facts, in good faith, that Darius was acting in the course and scope of his employment when the alleged incident occurred. (See CACI 3720.) To the extent that Plaintiff is alleging a cause of action for negligent hiring and retention, Plaintiff is given 20 days leave to amend to plead facts, in good faith, that Coneybeare knew or should have known that Darius was unfit to perform his job, or would create a harm, and that particular harm materialized. (See Phillips v. TLC Plumbing, Inc. (2009) 172 Cal.App.4th 1133, 1139.) Parties waived notice of the ruling. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/LCN)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-15-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Continued To Sep-05-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CONEYBEARE INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to September 5, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and 2.6C. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and operative pleadings to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 29, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
